textbox.text: Hmm I looked a lot at the eyes and the mouth, but for some of them I really couldn't tell if they were male or female so it was hard to tell and I just winged it pretty much by trying to make a split decision. I don't think I really had a strategy to "improve" performance though, I just went with what my gut told me and what I could see, and when I didn't know I just kind of guessed.
